item.title: The fact that a guy said this just makes this a lot more insane
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: (OC) Reference to MV Women Who Pose With Swords Like Guys On Tinder Pose With Fish
item.description:
I've seen all the poses. The thumbs up always gets me to laugh. (Not my best hair day but it's been windy okay.)
The dead stare cause it's all about the fish
The side hold
The front tilt
On your knees
My knees are really hurting but it's self sacrifice to impress the ladies
In yo face! Sorry for selfies but I was peer pressured by my comment in a most viral post Reference link: https://imgur.com/gallery/iEyJClE Y'all got me to get on my knees and share my own poses I've seen. Hope you like my gladius. Obviously a replica but still pretty heavy and fun. Got it for $5 at a garage sale over 10 years ago. @TheBloodyLady
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat

item.title: Eldritch Grandpa (OC)
item.description: Thanks for taking the time to read! This is the first strip in a comic series I started drawing recently. There aren't many strips yet but if you want to keep reading you can do so on my site here: https://eldritchgrandpa.com/ Or on Webtoon here: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/eldritch-grandpa/list?title_no=919806

Well darn, would have been funny if that worked.
Haha! We tricked the robot into solving the captcha! This is surely a victory for u-
They can solve the captchas, and pretended not to. ._.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: If your Amazon box delayed. Now you know why
item.description: When approaching a railroad crossing with no signals, you should: Slow down: Stop at least a dozen feet from the edge of the track. Look and listen: Turn your radio down to hear for an approaching train. Be cautious: Only cross the tracks when you know there are no trains coming. proceed with caution: Only cross the tracks after all signals are complete and when there's no evidence of trains approaching. Cross when it's safe: If no train is visible or it's safe to cross, you can proceed. Don't stop on the tracks: Trains can't stop quickly or swerve out of the way, and stopping on the tracks can result in injury or death.
item.dc:creator: Balikadam

item.title: I made George Takei laugh - I win the Internet today
item.description: MV edit - I'm honored twice in one day. as a person with PTSD and anxiety issues I'm not sure what to do with all this attention. Maybe I can tell you about all the books I'm giving away? More details here: https://imgur.com/gallery/Qut4L7z

item.title: My heart! A kid showing her friends her new prosthetic leg! It made me smile so I thought I'd share!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Love this! You're worth it... Hold out for your AC moment, it might not be instant but it will happen
item.description: Not mine but I thought this was worth sharing because I've been at rock bottom, I've attempted and now I can now say THANKFULLY failed... I wasn't thankful at the time... But I've made so many happy memories since, had so many life changing events (inc having another son) that wouldn't have happened if I succeeded Please reach out if you're feeling like it's all over, it isn't... You can get better, life can get better
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Images of Note: bedpilled
item.description:
uwu
HECK
no thoughts, head empty
Well fuck you medieval dudes! I would wear dresses more often if they had pockets. There is literally no single joy greater than finding a dress with pockets.
saaaaaaaaaaaame
The Inquisition: "YOU HAVE THE TAINT OF KHAOS!"
lorj
https://www.mozilla.org/en-GB/firefox/new/
Yeah
hell yes
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
The Unknown could actually work as a villain to be honest.
COLLIES ARE SUCH GOOD DOGS!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
